## Describe the feature

Please be as specific as possible! The more we know about your idea, the better we can evaluate it.

## Compliance Checklist

> Please confirm this feature is not a Social, Gate-keeping, or Medical Advice feature as defined in our CONTRIBUTING.md.

- [ ] This feature is for personal use/journaling only and does not add social networking.
- [ ] This feature does not have a syscourse agenda. (See: Gatekeeping features in CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] This feature does not provide medical advice or information. (See: Medical Advice features in CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
